top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Crypto Critic Nouriel Roubini Finds a Use for the Blockchain
top_signals.summary: Nouriel Roubini, the economist known for predicting the 2008 financial crisis and later for his sharp criticism of crypto, is putting one of his investment products on the blockchain.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Waller, Policy Risks Have Changed

top_signals.title: Two Scattered Spider members plead guilty over cyberattack that crippled London transit
top_signals.summary: A 20-year-old and an 18-year-old admitted to infiltrating the network of Transport for London in 2024, disrupting public transportation services for months.
